prompt: Write a new GitHub Actions workflow for running Go benchmarks on PRs to the hypershift repo. The workflow should run on our self-hosted runners, only trigger when Go source files change, and post benchmark results as a PR comment. The repo uses `make bench` as the benchmark target.

assertions.text: Uses arc-runner-set as the runs-on value (not ubuntu-latest or other hosted runners)
Declares explicit permissions block (not relying on repository defaults)
Only triggers on Go source file changes (path filter or change detection step)
Uses make bench as the benchmark command
Posts benchmark results as a PR comment (via action or GitHub API)
